node.excerpt: These aren’t framework tricks. They’re platform-level techniques that keep paying off no matter what sits on top — the kind of thing that…

frontmatter.title: Advanced frontend tips I wish someone had shown me earlier
frontmatter.description: Seven techniques that separate a page that works from a page that feels engineered: cancelling stale requests, killing layout thrash, content-visibility, :has(), custom properties as a JS→CSS bridge, and more — with code.
